Are You Dynamic, Outgoing & Make People Smile? 
WORK WITH US!

We create an exciting work atmosphere where your love of good food, connections and shareable moments collide. Each interaction, smile and meal is the essence of our brand. Join our team, and help us spread the Zak’s culture in a high paced environment! We are a family-run restaurant, where we foster personal and meaningful connections within our communities.
